headline: Nasdaq 100 Rallies, Oil Sinks To $75 On Iran Peace Deal: Stock Market Today
summary: Stocks staged a broad rebound Thursday as a signed U.S.-Iran peace deal sank oil and an Intel-Apple chip pact powered semis.
